query:
SELECT id, awayTeam, homeTeam, 
  spreadAwayBetsPct, spreadAwayMoneyPct, totalOverBetsPct, totalOverMoneyPct, mlAwayBetsPct, mlAwayMoneyPct
FROM games 
WHERE sport = 'NHL' AND gameDate = '2026-03-19'
  AND awayTeam IN ('new_york_islanders','new_york_rangers','montreal_canadiens')
ORDER BY awayTeam;
command:

  spreadAwayBetsPct, spreadAwayMoneyPct, totalOverBetsPct, totalOverMoneyPct, mlAwayBetsPct, mlAwayMoneyPct
FROM games 
WHERE sport = 'NHL' AND gameDate = '2026-03-19'
  AND awayTeam IN ('new_york_islanders','new_york_rangers','montreal_canadiens')
